---
title: Demystifying Bayesian Inference Workloads
author:
- Yu Wang
- Yuhao Zhu
- Glenn Ko
- Brandon Reagen
- Gu-Yeon Wei
- David Brooks
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ispass19.pdf
journ: ISPASS
year: 2019
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 24
---
